records.ety: [L. profanatio: cf. F. profanation. See Profane, v. t.]

defs: The act of violating sacred things, or of treating them with contempt or irreverence; irreverent or too familiar treatment or use of what is sacred; desecration; as, the profanation of the Sabbath; the profanation of a sanctuary; the profanation of the name of God.
The act of treating with abuse or disrespect, or with undue publicity, or lack of delicacy.
quotes: 'T were profanation of our joys To tell the laity our love.
